title: phyllanthus unioensis
intro: Phyllanthus unioensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Stonebreaker due to its ability to dissolve kidney stones. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, including liver and kidney disorders, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus unioensis include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve liver function, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus unioensis may include decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or capsules to reap its medicinal benefits.
